subject: Son Goku in Super Saiyan 3 transformation, with extremely long golden hair and an intense battle expression
description: A male humanoid figure fills the frame in a battle-ready pose, upper body dominant. The most visually striking feature is the extremely long golden-yellow hair that flows outward and downward, characteristic of the Super Saiyan 3 transformation. The face is tightly set with brow furrowed and teeth bared in an expression of intense exertion or rage. No eyebrows are visible, consistent with the SS3 form. A golden energy aura radiates from the figure, filling the background with warm yellow light and dynamic energy lines. The image is low resolution; fine details of clothing and body markings are not distinguishable.
foreground: Son Goku's upper body with massive flowing golden hair and power aura
background: Golden energy aura radiating outward with warm yellow-orange glow
emotion: intense rage or focused battle fury, teeth bared, no-brow intensity
